---
name: Bug report / unclear section
about: Something in the framework is wrong, missing, or confusing
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Which phase or section is affected?**
e.g. Phase 9 MCP Configuration, Phase 8.2 Web App Agents

**What's the problem?**
A clear description of what's wrong or unclear.

**What did you expect?**
What should it say or do instead?

**Project context (optional)**
What type of project were you using this for when you found the issue?
